concerns.text: Task T024 is duplicated. In Phase 4, T024 is 'Implement Linear Mixed Models'. In Phase 5, T024 is 'Unit test for sensitivity sweep'. This ID collision breaks traceability for the LMM implementation (FR-010/LMM substitution) and the US3 test coverage.

Task T025 is duplicated. In Phase 4, T025 is 'Implement multiple-comparison correction'. In Phase 5, T025 is 'Integration test for sensitivity analysis'. This breaks traceability for FR-004 (multiple-comparison correction) and US3 integration testing.

FR-007 (binarize metrics) and FR-008 (Random Forest Classification) are explicitly marked as 'Spec Gaps' in plan.md and omitted from tasks. While the plan justifies this scientifically, the tasks document lacks a specific task to 'Document the exclusion of FR-007/008 and justify the regression-only approach' to satisfy the requirement of addressing the spec contradiction.

FR-010 mandates PGLS. The plan substitutes LMM. While T024 (Phase 4) implements LMM, there is no explicit task to 'Document the substitution of PGLS with LMM due to lack of phylogenetic tree' to satisfy the requirement of addressing the spec contradiction and ensuring the report frames this correctly.

FR-009 requires the system to 'explicitly frame the study as predicting physiological state'. T027 mentions avoiding causal language, but no task explicitly covers the generation of the framing text or the logic to detect/validate the 'independent tolerance proxy' condition mentioned in FR-009.

SC-005 defines success as processing 'up to 10,000 images'. The plan and tasks (T012) restrict this to 1,000. There is no task to 'Update success criteria documentation to reflect the 1,000 image limit' or 'Document the deviation from SC-005' to ensure the success criterion is properly managed in the absence of the full dataset.
